#   u(30)     = 1.095098255959744                  (line 301)
#   u(10^4)   = 21.02530339471055                   (line 301)
#   u(28.261) = 9.876953517025014e6                 (line 372)

# Test 6.1.3 -- u(28.261) (high on pole wall); FW ref 9.876953517025014e6.

up_at_28261       = -6.2081830038720978e10

# Test 6.1.4 -- u(30) at 80-digit precision (for BigFloat-256 BigFloat 1e-65 tol).
# Source: N[WeierstrassP[30 + c1, {0, c2}], 80].

u_at_7_123  = 2.2364109999459131
